The proposed rule addresses a significant and widespread concern in the rental housing market—namely, the lack of transparency surrounding total housing costs. Overall, greater transparency and consistency in how rental costs are presented would benefit both consumers and responsible housing providers, and help foster a more competitive and trustworthy renta...

I would support requiring landlords to show renters why rental prices are rising and how much this changes their percent profit. I would support protecting renters whose landlords don't comply from having to pay the higher rentals. I would also want them to give a breakdown of any supply chain issues that contribute to rate hikes.
